channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Three killed in separate motorcycle crashes in Pangasinan
item.description: Three people died and one other was injured in a series of separate road accidents across Pangasinan over a span of two days, highlighting ongoing concerns over motorcycle-related crashes in the provi...

item.title: Study Confirms Turtles Are Closely Related to Birds and Crocodiles
item.description: Scientists don finally figure out where turtles belong for the tree of life after many years of confusion. For long, genetic studies show say turtles dey related to archosaurs, the group wey include m...

item.title: How FIFA Prepares and Maintains Perfect World Cup Turf
item.description: As the FIFA World Cup approaches, the quality of the playing field is receiving unprecedented attention. Millions of dollars and years of research have gone into developing the ideal grass for the wor...

item.title: Zanzibar increases funding and reforms to strengthen gender-based violence and child protection programmes
item.description: Zanzibar’s Ministry of Community Development, Gender, Elderly and Children has announced a major expansion of its efforts to combat gender-based violence (GBV) and improve child protection services ac...

item.title: Australian tinned tomatoes taste test shows minimal differences between brands including Mutti
item.description: In a recent taste test of 26 different brands of tinned tomatoes available in Australian supermarkets, journalist Nicholas Jordan discovered that brand choice, including premium options like Mutti, ma...

item.title: Encroachments reported in protected forest land near Damagundam VLF naval station amid clearance conditions
item.description: A significant environmental and administrative concern has emerged around the Damagundam reserve forest in Telangana’s Vikarabad district, where land has been allocated for a strategic Very Low Freque...

item.title: CAF criticised over off-field gamesmanship affecting South African football teams
item.description: The opinion piece argues that South African football teams, including Orlando Pirates, Mamelodi Sundowns, and the national side Bafana Bafana, are repeatedly disadvantaged by what is described as syst...

item.title: 007 First Light review: a standout James Bond origin story and arguably the best Bond game yet
item.description: IO Interactive’s ‘007 First Light’ reimagines James Bond as an origin story, placing players in the early career of the iconic secret agent before he fully earns his 00 status. The game follows Bond, ...

item.title: Tina Fey Says There Was No Conflict With Timothée Chalamet After Knicks Game Photos
item.description: Tina Fey addressed online reactions to photos showing her seated next to Timothée Chalamet during a New York Knicks game at Madison Square Garden in April 2026. The images sparked social media discuss...

item.title: SARB raises repo rate to 7% amid rising inflation and global economic pressures
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) has increased the repo rate by 25 basis points to 7%, following a Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) decision shaped by rising inflation and increased global economi...

item.title: Study Indicates Mosquitoes Could Be Developing Tolerance to DEET Repellent
item.description: Recent research suggests that mosquitoes may be gradually developing a reduced sensitivity to DEET, one of the most widely used insect repellents. DEET has long been considered effective at preventing...

item.title: US and Iran trade accusations over alleged truce violations after recent attacks
item.description: The article reports on rising tensions between the United States and Iran after both sides accused each other of violating an existing truce following a series of recent attacks. According to Agence F...

item.title: Port Hope man charged after allegedly impersonating first responder and unlawfully entering residence
item.description: A 28-year-old man from Port Hope, Ontario, is facing criminal charges after allegedly impersonating a first responder and entering a private home during a medical emergency. According to Cobourg Polic...

item.title: Tanzania Revenue Authority Warns Businesses About Upcoming Tax Policy Changes
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TPA) has officially advised all businesses and relevant stakeholders to prepare for new tax measures that the government plans to implement soon. Even though the full d...

item.title: Centre considering IAF support for secure transportation of NEET-UG retest papers on June 21
item.description: The Central government is reportedly considering the use of Indian Air Force aircraft to transport question papers for the NEET-UG retest scheduled on June 21. The move is being discussed as part of e...

item.title: Critics warn DHS airport staffing plan could disrupt major U.S. international travel hubs
item.description: The article reports on controversy surrounding comments by U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin regarding potential changes to Customs and Border Protection (CBP) staffing at major airpor...

item.title: Niniola mourns late husband Michael Ndika in emotional tribute after private marriage revelation
item.description: Nigerian Afro-house singer Niniola Apata has continued to express deep grief following the death of her husband and longtime business partner, Michael Ndika. The singer first announced his passing on ...

item.title: Pixar confirms Taylor Swift is not on Toy Story 5 soundtrack
item.description: Speculation recently surged online suggesting that Taylor Swift might have contributed a song to the ending credits of Toy Story 5. The rumours began when the pop star briefly posted a cryptic countdo...

item.title: DOJ officials express skepticism over Trump-linked investigation related to E. Jean Carroll case
item.description: A report highlights growing unease within the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) following the opening of an investigation connected to writer E. Jean Carroll and former President Donald Trump. Accordin...

item.title: Melbourne designer wins Australian Furniture Design Award with modular lamp made from eggshell waste
item.description: Melbourne-based furniture designer Joanne Odisho has won the Australian Furniture Design Award with an innovative lighting design made from discarded eggshells. Odisho collects thousands of eggshells ...
